title: Some questions
wikitext:
[]: Some questions...             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Thu Nov 10, 2005 3:05 pm I have some questions on NGE. 1) Since Rei has DNA from Yui (Shinji's mom) does that make her, like, his sister? and 2) Bardiel took over unit 03, and is the cause for Toji's not being able to pilot anymore. So, was Bardiel's purpose to get rid of Toji to make room for Kaworu (Tabris)?

[]: Re: Some questions...             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Nov 10, 2005 3:11 pm poetic_assassin wrote: I have some questions on NGE. 1) Since Rei has DNA from Yui (Shinji's mom) does that make her, like, his sister?

[]: Re: Some questions...             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Nov 10, 2005 3:12 pm poetic_assassin wrote: 1) Since Rei has DNA from Yui (Shinji's mom) does that make her, like, his sister?

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Thu Nov 10, 2005 3:18 pm But if Bardiel never came, then there wouldn't be an open Eva for Tabris. What I'm asking is if Bardiel was supposed to get Toji out of the way for him.

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Thu Nov 10, 2005 3:22 pm No... No Angel tries to get rid of itself, for another Angel. An Angel comes right after an Angel is killed, so all of the Angel's missions are to get to NERV. The Angels would not have known about the Dummy Plug System, and I know for sure they would not get themselves killed just for another Angel. Bardiel, is it?, was an airborne, gas-like Angel, so it couldn't really do anything without a host.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Nov 10, 2005 3:24 pm Its not implyed in anyway the Seele sent " Bardiel ". If they wanted to get him into NERV they could have just had an agent take out a pilot or maybe have ANOTHER eva send NERVS way. Heck with the kind of power he had they would have just given him a plane ticket to tokyo-3 and told him what to do, and to start when Shinji, Rei and Asuka were in class or home asleep. This is the angel only Rei's AT field was a match for remember? First rule of EVA the one with the best AT field usualy wins.

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Thu Nov 10, 2005 3:27 pm ... I never said SEELE sent Bardiel. That's the Angel's mission, on their own accord. To get to Adam, or Lillith, is their concern. And that rule is wrong. Remember that one Angel that raped Sohruyuu's mind? He had the best AT-Field, but was killed by a weapon.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Nov 10, 2005 3:42 pm First rule of EVA the one with the best AT field usualy wins. ANd the fourth angel gets taken out at a distance with a big ass partical beam cannon. Most of the time its the AT fields though. Their is also no evidence of why or how the angels do things, or they interact with others of their kind so I dont think so.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Nov 10, 2005 3:43 pm As Kaworu was assigned to EVA-02 after Arael mind-raped Asuka and rendered her useless, EVA-03's readiness or lack thereof seems immaterial to me. Araels's AT field was less important than its distance; Ramiel's AT field requierd much more power to penetrate.

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Thu Nov 10, 2005 3:48 pm superdoughboy4 wrote: No... No Angel tries to get rid of itself, for another Angel. An Angel comes right after an Angel is killed, so all of the Angel's missions are to get to NERV. The Angels would not have known about the Dummy Plug System, and I know for sure they would not get themselves killed just for another Angel. Bardiel, is it?, was an airborne, gas-like Angel, so it couldn't really do anything without a host.

[]:             Quote Post by defiate » Thu Nov 10, 2005 4:39 pm since someone brought it up, I think we might as well debate what caused the biggest toll onto Asuka. What I think is that the 15th angel only unleashed the memories inside Asuka... if those repressed memories weren't there then the damage done by the 15th angel won't be so severe; not enough to effectively cripple Asuka for pretty much the rest of the show. So which repressed memory or event did the most mental damage to Asuka? Is it thejealousy of Rei? (whom she affectionately refers to as "wondergirl") Is it the jealousy of Shinji's/Eva01's achievements? Is it being strangled by her mentally ill mother? or... is there some more things?

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Thu Nov 10, 2005 5:46 pm What about the lack of affection from her mother who went insane? How about the lack of affection from her father and the fact that her step mother rejected her? What about finally being beaten by Shinji in sync ratio? With Asuka there is a plethora of issues that may have caused the most damage. Just as there was with Shinji and there will be with just about every character in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Nov 10, 2005 6:11 pm Im all for saying it was the mind rape, as bad as thing were before that she was just broken after. It wasn't the memories that were broght up by the so much as the act itself I think that hurt her so bad. Listing to that scene its just awful what she went through. Not excatly peachy for Shinji to be forced to do nothing but listen while this happined, but gendos a bastard.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Thu Nov 10, 2005 6:31 pm Hold on, we forgot one thing. The worst thing that happened to her was her theme song >.> Right now I'd have to say the mind rape scene... But I'm fairly sure that this will change.

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Thu Nov 10, 2005 9:54 pm defiate wrote: since someone brought it up, I think we might as well debate what caused the biggest toll onto Asuka. What I think is that the 15th angel only unleashed the memories inside Asuka... if those repressed memories weren't there then the damage done by the 15th angel won't be so severe; not enough to effectively cripple Asuka for pretty much the rest of the show. So which repressed memory or event did the most mental damage to Asuka? Is it thejealousy of Rei? (whom she affectionately refers to as "wondergirl") Is it the jealousy of Shinji's/Eva01's achievements? Is it being strangled by her mentally ill mother? or... is there some more things?

[]:             Quote Post by akda1ndaonly1 » Fri Nov 11, 2005 12:26 am superdoughboy4 wrote: Remember that one Angel that raped Sohruyuu's mind? He had the best AT-Field, but was killed by a weapon.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Nov 11, 2005 12:32 am akda1ndaonly1 wrote: superdoughboy4 wrote: Remember that one Angel that raped Sohruyuu's mind? He had the best AT-Field, but was killed by a weapon.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Fri Nov 11, 2005 12:22 pm the angel was killed by THE weapon, the Lance of Longinus which is the only weapon that can penetrate at-fields. the power of the field does not really matter.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Nov 11, 2005 1:22 pm defiate wrote: since someone brought it up, I think we might as well debate what caused the biggest toll onto Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Fri Nov 11, 2005 2:02 pm Stop changing the subject! Another question: If Rei was cloned, was she engineered to want to obey Gendo?
